title: Fix all verified RimAI Framework defects
description: Implement the approved test-first repair plan for provider auth, request parameters, HTTP retries/timeouts, cache eviction, SSE finish reasons, embedding index mapping, and validation.
acceptance_criteria: All seven verified defects have regression tests and fixes; full test/build/XML validation passes; no live API calls or live RimWorld writes.
notes: Checkpoint 2026-06-21: implementation is WIP in /private/tmp/Rimworld_AI_Framework-fixes on branch codex/fix-known-issues. Added test project and initial fixes for all seven defects. Installed .NET SDK 8.0.128 and Mono 6.14.1. Tests/build have NOT been run; resume with dotnet test, triage compile failures, then packaging/XML/headless review. See docs/archive/checkpoint-2026-06-21-known-issues-fixes.md.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: M6: Full Autonomy + Guardrails + UI
description: Implement full autonomy controls, safety guardrails, and player UI. Spec doc: docs/plan/05-orchestration.md. Layer namespace: RimAI.Agent.Orchestration. Deliverables: autonomy dial (advisor→full player), decision log window, budget panel (per-day token/call budgets), safety guardrails, cadence scheduler, degradation order (Strategic→Tactical→Reactive). Non-negotiable: all persistent state in GameComponent/ExposeData; must load into saves that never had the mod and unload cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: full playthrough from landing to stable colony

title: M5: Memory + Strategic Planner
description: Implement Memory layer + Strategic planner. Spec docs: docs/plan/04-memory.md, docs/plan/02-cognition.md. Memory: episodic event log + embedding retrieval via Framework EmbeddingManager; working memory window; save-persisted via ExposeData. Strategic tier: scheduler-driven, ~every 2 game-days, strongest model. Scope: research path, expansion, wealth/threat balance, trade, recruitment. Embedding retrieval feeds strategic prompts with historical context.
acceptance_criteria: research + expansion decisions reference past events

title: M4: Tactical Planner
description: Implement the Tactical planner: work priorities, bills, zones via LLM tool calls. Spec doc: docs/plan/02-cognition.md. Tactical tier: scheduler-driven, ~every 6 game-hours, mid-tier model. Scope: work priorities, bills, zones, hauling, medical ops. Non-negotiable: Cognition speaks DTOs only — no direct Verse/RimWorld type access; every LLM action validated against JSON-schema whitelist.
acceptance_criteria: colony runs 5 game-days without human input, no starvation

title: M3: Reactive Loop
description: Implement the first closed loop: EventBus → Reactive planner → Action. Spec doc: docs/plan/02-cognition.md. Reactive tier: event-driven, <1 game-hour cadence, fast/cheap model. Handles raid, fire, mental break, medical emergencies. Commands: draft/undraft, firefight, rescue, retreat. Non-negotiable: LLM calls run async off-thread; results re-enter via main-thread queue; every LLM action validated against JSON-schema whitelist.
acceptance_criteria: AI drafts colonists and responds to a raid unattended

title: M2: Action
description: Implement the Action layer: command queue + whitelist executor + verifier for 10 core commands. Spec doc: docs/plan/03-action.md. Layer namespace: RimAI.Agent.Action. Whitelisted command executor covering work priorities, bills, zones, designations, drafting, research, trade, policies. Main-thread marshalled; post-execution verification. Non-negotiable: writes happen via main-thread command queue; deserializes ActionCommand DTOs only.
acceptance_criteria: scripted (no-LLM) command file drives the colony

title: M1: Perception
description: Implement the Perception layer: ColonySnapshot DTOs + EventBus for letters/alerts/damage/deaths. Spec doc: docs/plan/01-perception.md. Layer namespace: RimAI.Agent.Perception. Main-thread snapshotting of colony state into versioned JSON DTOs. Non-negotiable: all reads happen on main thread tick; serializes to plain DTOs only (no Verse/RimWorld types leak).
acceptance_criteria: dev-mode dump of a live colony snapshot as JSON

title: Run final validation and read-only review
description: Run complete tests, temporary packaging build, XML checks, diff checks, and read-only headless validation where policy permits.
acceptance_criteria: All available gates pass or environmental blockers are documented with exact evidence.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: Fix embedding index mapping
description: Map embedding results by authoritative response index with deterministic validation and positional fallback only when index path is absent.
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-order results map correctly and malformed index sets fail clearly.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: Fix cache eviction and SSE finish reasons
description: Bound the cache with deterministic eviction and preserve provider finish reasons through [DONE].
acceptance_criteria: Cache capacity and expiration tests pass; SSE terminal reasons are not overwritten.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: Fix HTTP retries and timeout configuration
description: Clone requests per attempt, use per-request timeout cancellation, and distinguish timeout from caller cancellation.
acceptance_criteria: Retries use distinct identical requests; timeout changes remain safe after requests; cancellation semantics are tested.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: Fix provider auth and typical_p behavior
description: Implement explicit/fallback API key requirements, local provider behavior, optional auth headers, and template-gated typical_p.
acceptance_criteria: Local providers work without keys; cloud providers require keys; typical_p is emitted only when explicitly supported.
close_reason: Implemented by headless workers; validated 5/5 PASS, build 0W/0E

title: Add net472 regression test infrastructure
description: Add the test project, solution wiring, reference assemblies package, and injectable seams needed by the defect tests.
acceptance_criteria: Test project is discoverable and compiles on supported SDK; initial regression tests can execute.
notes: Test project and solution wiring added, but restore/compile/test not yet run. Toolchain is now available. Resume by running the full test command and fixing infrastructure errors first.

title: Audit current code for correctness issues
description: Run a read-only parallel headless-agent review of the current RimAI Framework code, independently verify reported defects, and summarize confirmed findings with file/line evidence. Do not modify production code.
acceptance_criteria: Review covers API/contracts, HTTP/concurrency/cache, configuration/UI/translation, and build/deployment; every reported issue is independently verified; no production code is changed.
notes: Audit completed with one successful DeepSeek Flash Core/Execution worker, one stalled worker terminated, two worker dispatches denied by tenant policy, and local verification of all retained findings. Confirmed issues: local providers blocked without API key; HttpRequestMessage reused across retries; HttpClient.Timeout reconfiguration throws after first request; cache retains unread expired entries; SSE [DONE] overwrites finish reason; embedding response Index ignored; typical_p sent to all OpenAI-compatible providers. Build could not run because dotnet/msbuild are not installed. XML assets validated with xmllint.
close_reason: Read-only code audit completed and findings independently verified.
